reasoning: Packet loss is a more definitive indicator of network failure than throughput fluctuations, and the F1-u interface is directly connected to the root cause metrics. Secondary effects were observed on the E2 and A1 interfaces and the RICs.
actionable_steps: Check the physical and logical configuration of the F1-U interface. Inspect for MTU mismatches, congestion on the transport network, or failures in the User Plane Function (UPF) to CU-UP mapping.
